title: PlaceEcho cities database
description: Pre-built city database loaded by frontend/city-announcer.js to drive the dwell-triggered TTS announcements. ~555 entries, population > 1M, sourced from GeoNames CC BY 4.0. The frontend does a linear-scan nearest-city lookup filtered to the current viewport bounding box, then fetches the matching frontend/audio/cities/{slug}.m4a clip. M5 stage 3 — closes M3 tech-debt audit E.2.

name.description: Display name announced by the TTS clip (matches the {slug}.m4a content).

pop.description: Population at the time of database build (GeoNames). Used to sort ties in the nearest-city scan and to gate against tiny localities sneaking in below the 1M threshold.

slug.description: URL-safe identifier matching frontend/audio/cities/{slug}.m4a. Lowercase ASCII, digits, hyphens only — `name` is the spoken/displayed form, `slug` is the file lookup key.
